name: property-value-missing-all-sources
anchor: F1.PV missing-source fallback (no appraisal, broker silent)
rationale: Broker intake doesn't state property_value. No appraisal attached (DS=M1). loan_application + mortgage_statement only. F1.PV canonical-map has no source for property_value. Expected: Vienna flags missing, requests appraisal. Tests behavior when canonical_map fields cannot be derived from any source.
notes: Single-event sequence. Missing appraisal per DS=M1. Phase 4 spec: missing-PV escalation flow.
